name: Modül Glass Carb Cap & Terp Pearls
summary: The MODÜL Glass Carb Cap & Terp Pearls are engineered to enhance airflow control and vapour efficiency within the MODÜL system.
description: The MODÜL Glass Carb Cap & Terp Pearls are engineered to enhance airflow control and vapour efficiency within the MODÜL system. This precision-designed glass carb cap works together with terp pearls to create smoother airflow, helping concentrates vaporise evenly while improving overall vapour density and flavour. Crafted from durable borosilicate glass, the carb cap offers excellent heat resistance and purity of flavour. The included terp pearls rotate during inhalation, distributing concentrates across the heated surface for more consistent vaporisation and improved efficiency. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
